languages.text: {n}Кровь мгновенно пропитывает повязки, окрашивая их в багрово-алый. Вопреки ожиданиям, кровотечение не унимается — тягучая жидкость продолжает сочиться из-под бинтов. Лария отводит вашу руку в сторону.{/n} "Оставь. Сохрани медикаменты для своих людей. Тратить их на меня... бессмысленно, ".

{n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."
languages.original_text: {n}Кровь мгновенно пропитывает повязки, окрашивая их в багрово-алый. Вопреки ожиданиям, кровотечение не унимается — тягучая жидкость продолжает сочиться из-под бинтов. Лария отводит вашу руку в сторону.{/n} "Оставь. Сохрани медикаменты для своих людей. Тратить их на меня... бессмысленно, ".

Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicines for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

languages.text: {n}鲜血瞬间浸透层层绷带，将其染成暗红色。可出乎意料的是，出血并未止住——粘稠的液体依旧不断从包扎处渗出。菈丽雅推开你的手。{/n}“别管我了。把医疗补给留给你的人吧。浪费在我身上……已经没有意义了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

traits.locale_text: {n}鲜血瞬间浸透层层绷带，将其染成暗红色。可出乎意料的是，出血并未止住——粘稠的液体依旧不断从包扎处渗出。菈丽雅推开你的手。{/n}“别管我了。把医疗补给留给你的人吧。浪费在我身上……已经没有意义了。”

languages.text: {n}La sangre empapa la venda al instante, tiñéndola de un carmesí intenso. A diferencia de lo que esperabas, no para de sangrar. El fluido viscoso sigue supurando a través de la tela. Laria aparta tu mano.{/n} «Déjelo. Guarde los suministros médicos para su gente. Desperdiciarlos conmigo es... inútil».
languages.original_text: {n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

traits.locale_text: {n}La sangre empapa la venda al instante, tiñéndola de un carmesí intenso. A diferencia de lo que esperabas, no para de sangrar. El fluido viscoso sigue supurando a través de la tela. Laria aparta tu mano.{/n} «Déjelo. Guarde los suministros médicos para su gente. Desperdiciarlos conmigo es... inútil».

languages.text: {n}Le sang détrempe aussitôt les bandages, qui prennent une teinte écarlate. Déjouant vos attentes, le saignement ne s'arrête pas. Le fluide visqueux continue de suinter à travers les bandages. Laria repousse votre main.{/n} « Laissez-moi. Gardez les fournitures de medicae pour les vôtres. Les utiliser sur moi est... inutile. »
languages.original_text: {n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

Le fluide visqueux continue de suinter à travers les bandages. Laria repousse votre main.{/n} « Laissez-moi. Gardez les fournitures de medicae pour les vôtres. Les utiliser sur moi est... inutile. »

languages.text: {n}Kan, sargıları anında ıslatıp koyu kırmızıya boyuyor. Beklentilerin aksine kanama durmuyor. O yapışkan sıvı, sargıların altından sızmaya devam ediyor. Laria, elini kenara itiyor.{/n} "Bırak. Tıbbi malzemeleri kendi insanlarına sakla. Onları bende harcamak... Anlamsız."
languages.original_text: {n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kan, sargıları anında ıslatıp koyu kırmızıya boyuyor. Beklentilerin aksine kanama durmuyor. O yapışkan sıvı, sargıların altından sızmaya devam ediyor. Laria, elini kenara itiyor.{/n} "Bırak. Tıbbi malzemeleri kendi insanlarına sakla. Onları bende harcamak... Anlamsız."

languages.text: {n}Das Blut dringt sofort durch die Bandagen und färbt diese tiefrot. Entgegen deiner Erwartung hört die Blutung nicht auf und die zähe Flüssigkeit sickert weiter durch die medizinischen Verbände. Laria schiebt deine Hand weg.{/n} "Lasst es gut sein. Spart Euch die Medicae-Vorräte für Eure Leute. Sie für mich zu vergeuden, ist ... sinnlos."
languages.original_text: {n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."

Entgegen deiner Erwartung hört die Blutung nicht auf und die zähe Flüssigkeit sickert weiter durch die medizinischen Verbände. Laria schiebt deine Hand weg.{/n} "Lasst es gut sein. Spart Euch die Medicae-Vorräte für Eure Leute. Sie für mich zu vergeuden, ist ... sinnlos."

languages.text: {n}血が包帯を染み渡り、深い赤色に染まった。予想に反して出血は止まらず、粘り気のある血が包帯の下から染み出ている。ラリアはあなたの手を脇にそらす。{/n}「止めないで。薬草はあなたの人たちのために残しておけ。私を助けるために使うのは...無駄だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The blood instantly soaks through the bandages, staining them a deep crimson. Contrary to expectation, the bleeding does not stop — the viscous fluid continues to ooze from beneath the dressings. Laria pushes your hand aside.{/n} "Leave it. Save the medicae supplies for your people. Wasting them on me is... pointless."
